name: 伊拉蒂·戈罗斯蒂迪·阿吉雷切
awards: 2025年 第73届圣塞巴斯蒂安国际电影节 最佳新导演 最佳新导演特别提及 新纪元祭
2025年 第73届圣塞巴斯蒂安国际电影节 最佳新导演 (提名) 新纪元祭
name_full: 伊拉蒂·戈罗斯蒂迪·阿吉雷切 Irati Gorostidi Agirretxe
introduction: Irati Gorostidi (Eguesibar, Spain, 1988) has directed the medium-length Pasaia bitartean (2016) and the short films Euritan (Zinemaldia + Plus, 2017), with Arantza Santesteban, Unicornio (Kimuak, 2021) and San Simón (2022), winner of Proyecto X Films 2021 at the Punto de Vista Festival, where it had its premiere in 2022. Her short film Contadores was included in the 2022 Kimuak catalogue and screened in the Semaine de la Critique at the Festival de Cannes. With her debut feature film, Aro berria, she takes a closer look at the universe already broached in Contadores. The project for the film was selected, with the title of Anekumen, for Ikusmira Berriak 2022.
